Localization.Description: A user changed a predefined data value

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} changed database predefined data value "{object.property}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} changed database predefined data value "{object.property}" to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
